title: phaseolus vulgaris var. aureus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. aureus, also known as the yellow kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean plant that is prized for its vibrant yellow color and high nutritional value. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. The health benefits of consuming Phaseolus vulgaris var. aureus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide essential nutrients such as protein, fiber, and minerals. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and processing the beans, which can then be used in teas, capsules, or as a powder to support overall health and well-being.
